title: How do I use embeddings for search?

details.name: User Prompt
details.value: How do I use embeddings for search?

details.name: Response
details.value: Embeddings map text to vectors. To use them for search: embed your documents at index time, embed the query at search time, then find nearest neighbours using cosine similarity or dot product.

details.name: User Prompt
details.value: What is HNSW and when should I use it?

details.name: Response
details.value: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) is a graph-based ANN index. Use it when you need fast approximate nearest neighbour search at scale — it trades a small accuracy loss for much faster query times compared to exhaustive search.
